name: Goldcast B2B Virtual Event and Webinar Platform API
what_it_does: Goldcast B2B virtual event and webinar REST API for revenue marketing teams, demand generation leaders, and B2B SaaS companies to create and manage virtual conferences, webinars, and product launches — enabling programmatic event creation, attendee registration management, session configuration, CRM integration, and revenue attribution analytics through Goldcast's B2B-focused event platform. Enables AI agents to manage event creation for demand generation campaign automation, handle attendee registration for lead capture automation, access engagement data for revenue attribution automation, retrieve session recording for content repurposing automation, manage speaker coordination for event scheduling automation, handle CRM sync for Salesforce lead integration automation, access email notification for attendee communication automation, retrieve poll and Q&A for audience intelligence automation, manage on-demand for content library automation, and integrate Goldcast with Salesforce, HubSpot, and Marketo for end-to-end B2B event pipeline automation.
use_cases: Creating B2B webinars and virtual summits for demand generation pipeline automation agents
Syncing event attendance data with Salesforce/HubSpot for revenue attribution automation agents
Automating post-event content repurposing from recordings for B2B content marketing automation agents
Managing speaker coordination and agenda automation for large-scale B2B virtual conference agents
not_for: Consumer ticketing and public event discovery (Goldcast is B2B marketing-focused, not consumer events)
Large-scale in-person conferences without virtual component (Goldcast is virtual/hybrid-first)
Internal HR all-hands with no marketing intent (Hubilo or Zoom are better for internal comms)
best_when: A B2B SaaS marketing team or demand generation leader wanting AI agents to create virtual events and webinars, capture attendee data, and automatically sync engagement signals to Salesforce or HubSpot for revenue pipeline automation.
avoid_when: ENTERPRISE PLAN REQUIRED FOR API: Goldcast API requires Enterprise subscription; automated lower-tier API assumption creates no API access; automated must have Enterprise contract for API integration. CRM INTEGRATION IS PRIMARY VALUE: Goldcast's primary differentiation is deep CRM integration; automated event-without-CRM deployment assumption underutilizes Goldcast's core value; automated should plan Salesforce/HubSpot integration from the start. CONTENT REPURPOSING IS AI-DRIVEN: Goldcast includes AI content repurposing features; automated manual content processing assumption misses automated clip generation; automated can leverage Goldcast's built-in AI for transcript and clip generation. WEBINAR TYPES HAVE DIFFERENT CONFIGURATIONS: Goldcast supports webinars, virtual conferences, and hybrid events with different configuration models; automated single-type assumption creates wrong configuration for multi-session summits; automated must select correct event type and configure accordingly.

auth.notes: Goldcast uses API key authentication. REST API with JSON. Cambridge, MA HQ. Founded 2020 by Palash Soni and Kishore Kothandaraman. Products: Webinars, virtual summits, hybrid events, on-demand, content studio (AI repurposing), CRM integrations. SDKs: None public. B2B marketing-focused. Deep Salesforce, HubSpot, Marketo integrations. GDPR, SOC 2 compliant. Competes with Hubilo and On24 for B2B virtual events.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Demo available; production requires Enterprise contract
pricing.paid_tiers: Enterprise pricing based on events/attendees; custom contracts; CRM integrations included
pricing.notes: Cambridge MA. Enterprise contract for API. GDPR, SOC 2. B2B marketing event platform.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; event and registration APIs throttled per contract

known_agent_gotchas: ENTERPRISE CONTRACT REQUIRED: Goldcast API requires Enterprise subscription; automated self-service assumption creates no API access; automated must have signed Enterprise contract before API development

API KEY SCOPE IS ACCOUNT-WIDE: Goldcast API key provides access to all events in the account; automated per-event key assumption creates no per-event scoping; automated must implement application-level access control for multi-tenant event management

CRM SYNC IS THE CORE USE CASE: Goldcast's primary value is real-time CRM sync (Salesforce/HubSpot/Marketo); automated event-only integration without CRM connection underutilizes platform; automated should configure CRM integration webhooks from event start

WEBHOOK FOR ENGAGEMENT EVENTS: Goldcast webhooks fire on registration, attendance, question, and poll events; automated polling-based engagement assumption creates delayed revenue signal processing; automated should implement webhook handlers for real-time CRM updates

RECORDING IS AUTOMATIC: Goldcast automatically records all sessions; automated manual recording trigger assumption creates missed recording configuration; automated can retrieve recording URL from event API after session ends
agent_readiness.security_notes: B2B marketing events. GDPR, SOC 2, CCPA. API key. US/EU. Attendee and lead data.

security_score_components.security_notes: B2B event platform. GDPR, SOC 2. API key. US/EU. Marketing and lead data.
